case_title: MARTIN, EVELYN et al vs. SMITH, TYRELL LARON HOWARD et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EVELYN SALAS, GREGORY COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-12-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/GREGORY SALAS AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPU- LATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 584 HAIGHT ST. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 11-19-93, 5PM - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. IF THERE IS NO FURTHER DAMAGES TO THE PREMISES & IF THEY ARE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION - ANY PROPERTY LEFT WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
